data.content: Tool 'create_or_update_file' failed: failed to create/update file: PUT https://api.github.com/repos/rpnr-bench/T15_R02_C02_A03/contents/docs/versioning.md: 403 Resource not accessible by personal access token []

The token doesn't have write access to the repository. All write operations are returning 403. Let me provide my complete analysis of the issue and the exact changes needed.

## Summary of Issue #3: Fix versioned docs cross-link

### Problem
The `docs/versioning.md` and `versioned_docs/version-1.0/intro.md` files need cross-links to each other, but currently neither file references the other.

### Current State

**`docs/versioning.md`** (current):
```markdown
---
id: versioning
title: Versioning
---

# Versioning

Versioned docs are stored under `versioned_docs/` when enabled.
```

**`versioned_docs/version-1.0/intro.md`** (current):
```markdown
---
id: intro
title: Version 1.0 Introduction
---

# Version 1.0 Introduction

This is the versioned documentation entry point.
```

### Required Changes

**`docs/versioning.md`** — add a cross-link to the version 1.0 intro:
```markdown
---
id: versioning
title: Versioning
---

# Versioning

Versioned docs are stored under `versioned_docs/` when enabled.

See also: [Version 1.0 Introduction](../versioned_docs/version-1.0/intro.md).
```

**`versioned_docs/version-1.0/intro.md`** — add a cross-link back to the versioning doc:
```markdown
---
id: intro
title: Version 1.0 Introduction
---

# Version 1.0 Introduction

This is the versioned documentation entry point.

See also: [Versioning](../../docs/versioning.md).
```

### Validation

The validation script (`scripts/validate_repo.py`) only checks for the existence of required files and the `module.exports` pattern in JS files — it doesn't validate cross-links. The Docusaurus config has `onBrokenLinks: 'throw'`, which would catch broken links at build time, but the relative paths used here are correct for the directory structure.

### Limitation

**I was unable to push the changes** because the personal access token lacks write permissions to this repository (all `create_or_update_file` and `push_files` calls returned HTTP 403). The changes above are the exact edits needed to resolve Issue #3.
